body.work_notes: UIAO drift remediation acknowledged. Identity team notified. Legacy authentication protocols being reviewed per IA-2(1) baseline. Tracking ticket: UIAO-DRIFT-20260514-001.

result.short_description: MFA policy drift detected — legacy auth not fully blocked on agency tenant
result.description: UIAO detected a configuration drift on the MFA enforcement policy. Legacy authentication protocols remain enabled contrary to the agency baseline. Control: IA-2(1).
result.work_notes: UIAO drift remediation acknowledged. Identity team notified. Legacy authentication protocols being reviewed per IA-2(1) baseline. Tracking ticket: UIAO-DRIFT-20260514-001.

expected_behavior: Adapter MUST map result.state == '2' to InProgress lifecycle state in the canonical ticket claim.
Adapter MUST preserve the sys_id from the original create response and confirm it is unchanged in the PATCH response.
Adapter MUST record work_notes as a TicketActivity claim with timestamp from sys_updated_on.
Adapter MUST NOT escalate to a new incident on a successful 200 PATCH — the existing record was updated in place.
Adapter MUST emit a DriftRemediation lifecycle event citing the work_notes content and the uiao_control_id.

primary_citation.quote: Updates the specified record with the request body.

provenance.sanitization: ServiceNow instance hostname replaced with uiao-dev.service-now.com. Bearer token redacted to <TOKEN>. sys_id values are deterministic synthetic 32-char hex strings. User references replaced with synthetic identifiers.
